key_sentences.chinese: 总的来说，这次旅行的准备基本上没问题!
key_sentences.pinyin: Zǒng de lái shuō, zhè cì lǚ xíng de zhǔn bèi jī běn shàng méi wèn tí.
key_sentences.english: Generally speaking, the preparations for this trip are basically fine !

key_sentences.chinese: 她不但聪明，而且非常努力，几乎每天都在学习。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā bú dàn cōng míng, ér qiě fēi cháng nǔ lì, jī hū měi tiān dōu zài xué xí.
key_sentences.english: She is not only smart but also very hardworking — she studies almost every day.

key_sentences.chinese: 其实这两个问题差不多是一样的。
key_sentences.pinyin: Qí shí zhè liǎng ge wèn tí chà bu duō shì yí yàng de.
key_sentences.english: Actually these two problems are about the same.

key_sentences.chinese: 还有三个人没来，其他的人都到了，可以开始了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Hái yǒu sān ge rén méi lái, qí tā de rén dōu dào le,kě yǐ kāi shǐ le.
key_sentences.english: Three people haven't arrived yet, the others are all here, we can start.

key_sentences.chinese: 反正我去哪里都行，你决定就好，没问题的。
key_sentences.pinyin: Fǎn zhèng wǒ qù nǎ lǐ dōu xíng, nǐ jué dìng jiù hǎo, méi wèn tí de.
key_sentences.english: Anyway I'm fine with going anywhere — you decide, no problem.

key_sentences.chinese: 他几乎什么都会，不但会做饭，而且还会修车，挺厉害的。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā jī hū shén me dōu huì, bú dàn huì zuò fàn, ér qiě hái huì xiū chē, tǐng lì hài de.
key_sentences.english: He can do almost everything — not only can he cook, but he can also fix cars. he's pretty impressive.

grammar_points.title: 几乎 / 基本上 / 差不多 — Near-totality adverbs
grammar_points.explanation: Three similar but distinct adverbs of near-totality. 几乎 = almost (very close to 100%, often paired with 都 or 没): 几乎所有人都来了 = Almost everyone came. 基本上 = basically / essentially (most, but acknowledges some exceptions): 基本上完成了 = basically finished. 差不多 = approximately / about the same: 差不多好了 = almost better. 差不多 can also compare two things: A和B差不多 = A and B are about the same. 几乎 is the strongest (closest to 100%); 差不多 is the most approximate.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ jī hū měi tiān dōu duàn liàn.
Zhè jiàn shì jī běn shàng jiě jué le.
Tā hé wǒ chà bu duō gāo.
examples.english: He and I are about the same height.

exercises.question: Which adverb is closest in meaning to 'almost 100%' and often pairs with 都?
Fill in: 这个项目___已经完成了，还有一点小细节。
他和我差不多高 means ?
exercises.correct: He and I are about the same height.
options: He and I are about the same height.
He is much taller than me.
He is almost taller than me.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 几乎 correctly?
exercises.correct: 她几乎每天都练习汉语。
options: 她几乎每天都练习汉语。
她每天几乎练习都汉语。
几乎她每天练习汉语都。
option_pinyin: Tā jī hū měi tiān dōu liàn xí hàn yǔ.
Tā měi tiān jī hū liàn xí dōu hàn yǔ.
Jī hū tā měi tiān liàn xí hàn yǔ dōu.
Tā liàn xí jī hū hàn yǔ měi tiān.

exercises.question: 这两个地方差不多一样? Which is correct ?
exercises.correct: These two places are about the same.
options: These two places are about the same.
These two places are completely identical.
These two places are almost nothing alike.
One of these places is much better.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'almost (very close to 100%, near complete)'?
Which sentence is correct?
option_pinyin: jī běn shàng méi wèn tí
méi jī běn shàng wèn tí
wèn tí jī běn shàng méi
jī běn méi shàng wèn tí

grammar_points.title: 不但...而且... — Not only...but also...
grammar_points.explanation: Subject + 不但 + A，而且/还 + B  or 不但 A, 而且还 B. The second part (而且) adds a point that goes beyond A. The B element is typically stronger or more impressive than A. You can replace 不但 with '不仅' for a more formal register. Adding 还 makes it more colloquial.Both clauses usually share the same subject.

examples.pinyin: Tā bú dàn cōng míng, ér qiě nǔ lì.
examples.english: She is not only smart but also hardworking.

examples.chinese: 这里不但风景好，而且空气也很新鲜。
examples.pinyin: Zhè lǐ bú dàn fēng jǐng hǎo, ér qiě kōng qì yě hěn xīn xiān.
examples.english: Not only is the scenery here beautiful, but the air is also very fresh.

exercises.question: Fill in: 他不但会说英语，___会说法语。
Which sentence correctly uses 不但...而且?
exercises.correct: 他不但帮了我，而且还教了我很多。
options: 他不但帮了我，而且还教了我很多。
他而且帮了我，不但还教了我很多。
不但他帮了我，而且教了我很多他。
他帮了我不但，而且教了我很多。
option_pinyin: Tā bú dàn bāng le wǒ, ér qiě hái jiāo le wǒ hěn duō.
Tā ér qiě bāng le wǒ, bú dàn hái jiāo le wǒ hěn duō.
Bù dàn tā bāng le wǒ, ér qiě jiāo le wǒ hěn duō tā.
Tā bāng le wǒ bú dàn, ér qiě jiāo le wǒ hěn duō.

exercises.question: Translate: 这道菜不但好看，而且非常好吃。
exercises.correct: This dish is not only beautiful but also very delicious.
options: This dish is not only beautiful but also very delicious.
This dish looks good but doesn't taste good.
This dish is either beautiful or delicious.
This dish is beautiful, but it's not very delicious.

exercises.question: In 不但...而且, which clause is typically more impressive or adds more information?
exercises.correct: The 而且 clause (the second part)
options: The 而且 clause (the second part)
The 不但 clause (the first part)
The clause that comes after 还

mini_exercises.question: 不但...而且 expresses...
mini_exercises.correct: Not only A, but also B (B is typically stronger than A)
options: Not only A, but also B (B is typically stronger than A)

mini_exercises.question_english: He not only works hard, but also is smart.

options: 她不但会唱歌，而且会跳舞。
她而且不但会唱歌，会跳舞。
不但她会唱歌，而且跳舞。
她会不但唱歌，而且跳舞。
option_pinyin: tā bú dàn huì chàng gē ér qiě huì tiào wǔ
tā ér qiě bú dàn huì chàng gē huì tiào wǔ
bú dàn tā huì chàng gē ér qiě tiào wǔ
tā huì bú dàn chàng gē ér qiě tiào wǔ

grammar_points.title: 疑问代词的灵活运用 — Flexible interrogative pronouns
grammar_points.explanation: Question words used with 都 or 也 become indefinite pronouns meaning 'every-' or 'any-'. Positive sentences with 都: 他'什么都'吃 = He eats everything. 她'哪里都'去 = She goes everywhere. '谁都'可以来 = Anyone can come. Negative sentences with 也: 我'什么也'不吃 = I'm not eating anything. 他'哪里也'不想去 = He doesn't want to go anywhere. 反正 often appears with these patterns: 反正我哪里都行 = Anyway, anywhere works for me.

examples.pinyin: Tā shén me dōu zhī dào, zhēn lì hài.

examples.chinese: 反正我哪里都行，你决定吧。
examples.pinyin: Fǎn zhèng wǒ nǎ lǐ dōu xíng, nǐ jué dìng ba.
examples.english: Anyway, I'm fine with anywhere — you decide.

examples.pinyin: shéi dōu kě yǐ lái cān jiā.
examples.english: Anyone is welcome to come and join.

exercises.question: What does 他什么都吃 mean?
option_pinyin: Tā shén me yě bù chī.

exercises.question: Fill in: 我今天哪儿___不想去，就想待在家里。

option_pinyin: Shéi dōu kě yǐ cān jiā.
Shéi yě kě yǐ cān jiā.
Méi yǒu shéi kě yǐ cān jiā.
Shéi cān jiā dōu bù kě yǐ.

exercises.question: What is the difference between 什么都 and 什么也不?
exercises.correct: 什么都 = everything (positive); 什么也不 = nothing (negative)
options: 什么都 = everything (positive); 什么也不 = nothing (negative)
什么都 = nothing (negative); 什么也不 = everything (positive)
They both mean 'everything' in different registers
什么都 is a question; 什么也不 is an answer

exercises.question: Translate: 她做什么都做得很好。
options: She does everything, but not well.
She doesn't want to do anything.

mini_exercises.question: 什么都 + Verb means...
mini_exercises.correct: Everything / anything (question word as indefinite pronoun with 都)
options: Everything / anything (question word as indefinite pronoun with 都)

tā shén me dōu bù chī

quiz.question: What does 其他 mean?
What does 差不多 mean?
What does 基本上 mean?
What does 几乎 mean?
What does 大概 mean?
What does 反正 mean?
What does 其实 mean?
What does 还行 mean?
What does 没问题 mean?
What does 总的来说 mean?
Fill in: 她不但会唱歌，___会弹钢琴。
Which sentence means 'He knows everything'?
Which adverb is used for the closest to 100% approximation?
Fill in: 其他的___没问题，你放心吧。
Translate: 总的来说还不错，其他都还行。
quiz.correct: Generally speaking, not bad — the rest are all fine.
options: Generally speaking, not bad — the rest are all fine.
Everything is perfect — nothing is wrong.
Generally it's bad — there are many problems.
The rest are bad — only one thing is fine.

quiz.question: What does 几乎每天 mean?
Translate: 其实挺好的，你不用担心。
quiz.correct: Actually it's pretty good — you don't need to worry.
options: Actually it's pretty good — you don't need to worry.
It's really bad — you should worry.
You don't need it — it's fine.
It's basically the same as before.

quiz.question: Which sentence correctly uses 不但...而且?
quiz.correct: 他不但聪明，而且很努力。
options: 他不但聪明，而且很努力。
他而且聪明，不但很努力。
他不但，聪明而且很努力。

quiz.question: What does 反正都行 mean?
Translate: 差不多一样，基本上没问题。
quiz.correct: Almost the same — basically no problem.
options: Almost the same — basically no problem.
Completely different — there are many problems.
A little different — there are some issues.
Basically the same — definitely a problem.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 波伏娃，我们去北京旅行的东西，你都准备好了吗？
lines.pinyin: Bō Fú Wá, wǒ men qù Běi jīng lǚ xíng de dōng xi, nǐ dōu zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Beauvoir, have you got everything ready for our trip to Beijing?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 基本上没问题！机票和酒店都订好了，其他的差不多也好了。
lines.pinyin: Jī běn shàng méi wèn tí! Jī piào hé jiǔ diàn dōu dìng hǎo le, qí tā de chà bù duō yě hǎo le.
lines.english: Basically no problem! The flights and hotel are all booked — the rest is almost sorted too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了！那行程安排呢？我们去哪里，你有计划吗？
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Nà xíng chéng ān pái ne? Wǒ men qù nǎ lǐ, nǐ yǒu jì huà ma?
lines.english: Great! What about the itinerary? Do you have a plan for where we'll go?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 反正我哪里都行，你决定就好。故宫不但很有名，而且门票也不贵。
lines.pinyin: Fǎn zhèng wǒ nǎ lǐ dōu xíng, nǐ jué dìng jiù hǎo. Gù gōng bú dàn hěn yǒu míng, ér qiě mén piào yě bú guì.
lines.english: Anyway I'm fine with anywhere — you decide. The Forbidden City is not only very famous but the tickets are also not expensive.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好！那我们几乎每天都安排了一个景点。这次旅行应该很棒！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo! Nà wǒ men jī hū měi tiān dōu ān pái le yī ge jǐng diǎn. Zhè cì lǚ xíng yīng gāi hěn bàng!
lines.english: Great! then we have planed one attraction almost every day. This trip should be wonderful!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 总的来说不错！细节我还要再检查一下，但大概是没问题的。
lines.pinyin: Zǒng de lái shuō bú cuò! Xì jié wǒ hái yào zài jiǎn chá yí xià, dàn dà gài shì méi wèn tí de .
lines.english: Generally speaking, not bad! I still need to double-check some details, but it's probably fine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 李老师，这个学期我的表现怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Lǐ lǎo shī, zhè ge xué qī wǒ de biǎo xiàn zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Teacher Li, how was my performance this term?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 总的来说不错！你不但进步了很多，而且几乎每次作业都完成得很好。
lines.pinyin: Zǒng de lái shuō bú cuò! Nǐ bú dàn jìn bù le hěn duō, ér qiě jī hū měi cì zuò yè dōu wán chéng de hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Generally speaking, not bad! Not only have you improved a lot, but you also completed almost every assignment very well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢老师！其实我觉得我的口语还行，但是写作还有一些问题。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie lǎo shī! Qí shí wǒ jué de wǒ de kǒu yǔ hái xíng, dàn shi xiě zuò hái yǒu yì xiē wèn tí.
lines.english: Thank you, Teacher! Actually I think my speaking is OK, but my writing still has some issues.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 写作没太大问题，其他各个方面也都很好。
lines.pinyin: Xiě zuò méi tài dà wèn tí, dàn qí tā gè ge fāng miàn yě dōu hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Writing is basically fine, all the other areas are also very good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那下学期我应该怎么做？我什么都想提高。
lines.pinyin: Nà xià xué qī wǒ yīng gāi zěn me zuò? Wǒ shén me dōu xiǎng tí gāo.
lines.english: Then what should I do next term? Anyway I want to improve everything.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大概每周多写一篇文章就可以了。你这样努力，下学期肯定没问题！
lines.pinyin: Dà gài měi zhōu duō xiě yì piān wén zhāng jiù kě yǐ le. Nǐ zhè yàng nǔ lì, xià xué qī kěn dìng méi wèn tí!
lines.english: Probably just write one extra article per week. Working this hard, you'll definitely have no problems next term!
